chunks.title: Shecaniah's Proposal to Ezra
chunks.reason: Ezra prays and Shecaniah proposes a covenant to put away foreign wives.

chunks.title: Ezra's Mourning and the Assembly Gathering
chunks.reason: Narrative of Ezra fasting and the people gathering in Jerusalem.

chunks.title: Ezra's Speech and Implementation Plan
chunks.reason: Ezra exhorts the people, they propose a committee plan, and Ezra begins the investigation.

chunks.title: List of Men with Foreign Wives
chunks.reason: A detailed catalog of priests, Levites, singers, gatekeepers, and Israelite families who married foreign women.
